mapper.select:
SELECT cc.code, cc.code_name FROM drink d
JOIN common_code cc ON cc.group_code = 'TASTE_METRIC'
WHERE d.drink_id = #{drinkId}
AND d.is_deleted = 'N' AND cc.use_yn = 'Y' AND cc.is_deleted = 'N' AND ( cc.parent_code IS NULL OR cc.parent_code = d.category_code )
ORDER BY cc.sort_seq ASC, cc.code ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tasting_note_metric ( note_id, metric_code, score ) VALUES ( #{noteId}, #{metricCode}, #{score} )
mapper.select:
SELECT tnm.*, cc.code_name AS metricName
FROM tasting_note_metric tnm
LEFT JOIN common_code cc ON tnm.metric_code = cc.code AND cc.group_code = 'TASTE_METRIC'
WHERE note_id = #{noteId}

SELECT tnm.metric_code, cc.code_name AS metricName, ROUND(AVG(tnm.score), 1) AS avgScore
FROM tasting_note_metric tnm
JOIN tasting_note tn ON tn.note_id = tnm.note_id AND tn.drink_id = #{drinkId} AND tn.is_deleted = 'N'
LEFT JOIN common_code cc ON cc.code = tnm.metric_code AND cc.group_code = 'TASTE_METRIC'
GROUP BY tnm.metric_code, cc.code_name, cc.sort_seq ORDER BY cc.sort_seq
